name: Custom Cursor Extension
description: A simple demo extension that lets you change your cursor to an image or emoji.
longDescription: Custom Cursor Extension is a simple demo Chrome extension that lets users personalize their browsing experience by replacing the default cursor with a custom image or emoji. It is included here as a lightweight example extension with its own project page and privacy policy route in the JSON-driven hub.

privacyPolicy.summary: This extension does not collect, store, transmit, or share any personal or technical data. All functionality runs locally within your browser, and no information ever leaves your device.

sections.title: 1. Overview
sections.body: Custom Cursor Extension is a simple Chrome extension that lets users change the cursor to a selected image or emoji for demonstration purposes. It operates locally in the browser and does not communicate with external servers.

sections.title: 2. Data Collection
sections.body: This extension does not collect, store, log, or transmit any personal information, browsing history, technical identifiers, or usage analytics. No cookies or tracking mechanisms are used.

sections.title: 3. Data Use
sections.body: Because no data is collected, the extension does not use or process any data for analytics, advertising, personalization, or any other secondary purpose.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.body: This extension does not share, sell, or transmit any information to third parties, advertisers, analytics providers, or external servers.

sections.title: 5. Permissions
sections.body: The extension only uses the minimum browser capabilities required to render a custom cursor on supported pages. It does not request unnecessary permissions such as analytics, remote access, or unrelated browser data access.

sections.title: 6. Children's Privacy
sections.body: The extension does not target children and does not knowingly collect any personal information from users of any age.

sections.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: If this privacy policy is updated in the future, the 'Last updated' date will be adjusted accordingly. Any changes will remain consistent with Chrome Web Store Developer Program Policies.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.body: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at whltn8282@gmail.com.

dataPractices.title: Personal data (name, email, identifiers)
dataPractices.description: No personal information is collected, stored, or transferred by this extension.

dataPractices.title: Usage data or analytics
dataPractices.description: No analytics, behavioral tracking, or activity logging is performed.

dataPractices.title: Technical information
dataPractices.description: The extension does not collect device, browser, system, or network information.

dataPractices.title: General statement
dataPractices.description: All functionality runs entirely within the user's browser, and no data ever leaves the device.

privacyPolicy.thirdPartiesDescription: This extension does not send data to or integrate with any external APIs, services, analytics tools, or third-party platforms.

name: YouTube ArrowDown Blocker
description: Prevents accidental timeline rewinds on YouTube when the ArrowDown key is pressed.
longDescription: YouTube ArrowDown Blocker is a lightweight browser utility built to stop unintended playback jumps caused by the ArrowDown shortcut. This starter entry demonstrates how each extension can have a dedicated project page and a separately linked privacy policy while still being managed from one JSON source.

privacyPolicy.summary: This extension does not collect, store, transmit, or share any personal or technical data. All functionality runs locally within your browser, and no information ever leaves your device.

sections.title: 1. Overview
sections.body: YouTube ArrowDown Blocker is a lightweight Chrome extension that blocks the Arrow Down key on YouTube watch pages to prevent unwanted timeline rewinding after dragging. It operates exclusively as a local content script and does not communicate with external servers.

sections.title: 2. Data Collection
sections.body: This extension does not collect, store, log, or transmit any personal information, browsing history, technical identifiers, or usage analytics. No cookies or tracking mechanisms are used.

sections.title: 3. Data Use
sections.body: Because no data is collected, the extension does not use or process any data for analytics, advertising, personalization, or any other secondary purpose.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.body: This extension does not share, sell, or transmit any information to third parties, advertisers, analytics providers, or external servers.

sections.title: 5. Permissions
sections.body: The extension requires no permissions beyond injecting a small content script into YouTube watch pages. Because no permissions such as storage, tabs, or network access are requested, the extension cannot access or modify any browser data outside of blocking the Arrow Down key event within the current page.

sections.title: 6. Children's Privacy
sections.body: The extension does not target children and does not knowingly collect any personal information from users of any age.

sections.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: If this privacy policy is updated in the future, the 'Last updated' date will be adjusted accordingly. Any changes will remain consistent with Chrome Web Store Developer Program Policies.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.body: If you have questions about this privacy policy, please contact us at whltn8282@gmail.com.

dataPractices.title: Personal data (name, email, identifiers)
dataPractices.description: No personal information is collected, stored, or transferred by this extension.

dataPractices.title: Usage data or analytics
dataPractices.description: No analytics, behavioral tracking, or activity logging is performed.

dataPractices.title: Technical information
dataPractices.description: The extension does not collect device, browser, system, or network information.

dataPractices.title: General statement
dataPractices.description: All functionality runs entirely within the user's browser, and no data ever leaves the device.

privacyPolicy.thirdPartiesDescription: This extension does not send data to or integrate with any external APIs, services, analytics tools, or third-party platforms.

name: KeyVid
description: Controls HTML5 video playback with keyboard shortcuts on registered websites.
longDescription: KeyVid is a lightweight browser extension that lets users control HTML5 video playback with keyboard shortcuts on websites they register. It runs locally in the browser, stores only the approved site list in local storage, and does not send user data to external servers.

privacyPolicy.summary: KeyVid does not collect, store, transmit, or share personal or technical data. The extension stores only the user’s registered website list locally in the browser so it can enable video shortcuts on approved sites.

sections.title: 1. Overview
sections.body: KeyVid is a Chrome extension that adds keyboard shortcuts for video playback on websites the user registers. It operates locally in the browser and does not communicate with external servers.

sections.title: 2. Data Collection
sections.body: KeyVid does not collect personal information, browsing history, analytics, technical identifiers, or usage logs. It stores only the list of websites the user chooses to register, and that list stays in the browser's local storage.

sections.title: 3. Data Use
sections.body: The locally stored site list is used only to decide where KeyVid should activate. No data is used for advertising, profiling, analytics, or any purpose unrelated to video control on registered sites.

sections.title: 4. Data Sharing
sections.body: KeyVid does not sell, share, or transmit user data to third parties, advertisers, analytics providers, or external services.

sections.title: 5. Permissions
sections.body: KeyVid uses minimum browser permissions needed to read the current tab URL in the popup, inject its content script on approved sites, and store the user's registered website list locally.

sections.title: 6. Children's Privacy
sections.body: KeyVid is not designed for children and does not knowingly collect personal information from users of any age.

sections.title: 7. Changes to This Policy
sections.body: If this policy changes, the last updated date will be revised to match the current version. The policy will continue to reflect how the extension actually behaves.

sections.title: 8. Contact
sections.body: If you have questions about this privacy policy, contact whltn8282@gmail.com.

dataPractices.title: Personal data (name, email, identifiers)
dataPractices.description: KeyVid does not collect or transmit personal information.

dataPractices.title: Usage data or analytics
dataPractices.description: KeyVid does not collect analytics, behavioral tracking, or usage logs.

dataPractices.title: Technical information
dataPractices.description: KeyVid does not collect device, browser, system, or network information.

dataPractices.title: Local site registration only
dataPractices.description: The extension stores only the user's registered website list locally in the browser and does not send that list to any external server.

privacyPolicy.thirdPartiesDescription: KeyVid does not send user data to external APIs, analytics tools, advertising platforms, or third-party services.
